glosses.vi: đồng hồ báo thức; thức dậy
glosses.ja: 目覚まし時計; 目覚め

translations.it: La mia sveglia sta già suonando.
translations.vi: Chuông báo thức của tôi đã reo rồi.
translations.hi: मेरा अलार्म पहले से ही बज रहा है.
translations.ja: 私の目覚ましがもう鳴っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; determines the noun 'réveil'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb 'sonne'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'réveil' as subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb 'sonne'.

sentences.target: Tu mets le réveil à six heures.
sentences.reading: /ty mɛ lə ʁevɛj a siz œʁ/

translations.fr: Tu mets le réveil à six heures.
translations.ipa: /ty mɛ lə ʁevɛj a siz œʁ/
translations.en: You set the alarm for six o'clock.
translations.es: Pones el despertador a las seis.
translations.de: Du stellst den Wecker auf sechs Uhr.
translations.pt: Você ajusta o alarme para as seis.
translations.vi: Bạn đặt báo thức lúc sáu giờ.
translations.ar: أنت تضبط المنبّه على الساعة السادسة.
translations.nl: Je zet de wekker op zes uur.
translations.hi: तुम अलार्म छह बजे के लिए लगाते हो.
translations.el: Ρυθμίζεις το ξυπνητήρι για τις έξι.
translations.nb: Du stiller vekkerklokka til klokka seks.
translations.id: Kamu menyetel alarm untuk jam enam.
translations.da: Du sætter alarmen til klokken seks.
translations.ja: 目覚ましを6時にセットする。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'mets'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, takes object 'le réveil' and a time PP 'à six heures'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'réveil'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'mets'.
Preposition introducing a time complement ('à six heures').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures' in the PP.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: On cherche un réveil plus silencieux.

translations.fr: On cherche un réveil plus silencieux.
translations.en: We're looking for a quieter alarm clock.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un despertador más silencioso.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando una sveglia più silenziosa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找一个更安静的闹钟。
translations.yue: 我哋搵緊一個靜啲嘅鬧鐘。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um despertador mais silencioso.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים שעון מעורר שקט יותר.
translations.tr: Daha sessiz bir çalar saat arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một chiếc đồng hồ báo thức yên tĩnh hơn.
translations.hi: हम एक अधिक शांत अलार्म घड़ी ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε για ένα πιο αθόρυβο ξυπνητήρι.
translations.nb: Vi ser etter en stillere vekkerklokke.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari jam alarm yang lebih senyap.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en tystare väckarklocka.
translations.ro: Căutăm un ceas deșteptător mai silențios.
translations.da: Vi leder efter et mere stille vækkeur.
translations.ja: 私たちはもっと静かな目覚まし時計を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular; subject of 'cherche'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selects object 'un réveil'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'réveil'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Comparative adverb modifying the adjective 'silencieux'.
Adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'réveil' (comparative phrase with 'plus').

sentences.target: Il faut mettre le réveil à sept heures.
sentences.reading: /il fo mɛtʁ lə ʁevɛj a sɛt œʁ/

translations.fr: Il faut mettre le réveil à sept heures.
translations.ipa: /il fo mɛtʁ lə ʁevɛj a sɛt œʁ/
translations.en: We need to set the alarm for seven.
translations.es: Tenemos que poner el despertador a las siete.
translations.de: Wir müssen den Wecker auf sieben Uhr stellen.
translations.it: Dobbiamo impostare la sveglia alle sette.
translations.ko: 우리는 알람을 일곱 시에 맞춰야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要把闹钟定在七点。
translations.yue: 我哋要將鬧鐘定喺七點。
translations.ru: Нам нужно поставить будильник на семь.
translations.pt: Precisamos ajustar o despertador para as sete.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לכוון את השעון לשבע.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cần đặt báo thức lúc bảy giờ.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى ضبط المنبّه على الساعة السابعة.
translations.nl: We moeten de wekker op zeven uur zetten.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно поставити будильник на сьому.
translations.hu: Be kell állítanunk az ébresztőt hét órára.
translations.hi: हमें अलार्म सात बजे के लिए लगाना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να ρυθμίσουμε το ξυπνητήρι για τις επτά.
translations.nb: Vi må stille vekkerklokka til klokka sju.
translations.id: Kita perlu menyetel alarm untuk jam tujuh.
translations.sv: Vi behöver ställa alarmet till klockan sju.
translations.ro: Trebuie să setăm alarma pentru ora șapte.
translations.da: Vi skal sætte vækkeuret til klokken syv.
translations.fi: Meidän täytyy asettaa herätys kello seitsemäksi.
translations.ja: 七時に目覚ましを設定する必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive subject pronoun used with 'faut'; no concrete referent.
Impersonal defective verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses necessity, selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'faut', denotes the action required.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'réveil'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'mettre'.
Preposition introducing a time complement ('à sept heures').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures' in the PP.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'à'.
